feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)

entry.title: Tim's Guide to Teenage Parenting
entry.summary:
Author: Justasockmanwithswag

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,246Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 57

Summary: Tim is in great grief so to fix his grief he obviously should try to clone his dead boyfriend right? I like the tim tries to clone kon and ends up with a baby too much so i wrote one because im in too deep baby. And btw theres a twist and my own OC who may be a little bit OP but shhh English IS my 1st langugue so its not that good. also ppl are reading my shit now so thats crazy. Please comment, lowk lets me know ppl are reading my shit and also motivates me to update more regularly.

entry.title: Glittering Shades of Pain
entry.summary:
Author: maelstorms

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,324Chapters: 15/26Kudos: 139

Summary: Whumpril 2026! Mostly unrelated oneshots. Check Chapter 1 for summaries of each oneshot so you find the tag you were looking for :)) Day 1: Beg - Whumpee: Tim Day 2: Bite - Whumpee: Dick Day 3: Crashed - Whumpee: Tim Day 5: Trigger - Whumpee: Jason Day 6: Carried - Whumpee: Bruce Day 7: Cramps - Whumpee: Tim Day 8: Collapse - Whumpee: Dick Day 10: Migraine - Whumpee: Bruce Day 11: Sedation - Whumpee: Jason Day 15: First Aid Kit - Whumpee: Jason Day 16: Side Effects - Whumpee: Dick Day 19: Ears Ringing - Whumpee: Dick Day 23: "Keep them calm" - Whumpee: Dick Day 26: "Don't look at me" - Whumpee: Damian

entry.title: Mad Honey on your Teeth
entry.summary:
Author: This_is_your_Heichou_speaking

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,614Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 46

Summary: His body was rocking back and forth, back and forth, and there was a heaviness in between his legs, an electricity in his limbs. He tried to speak, mouth swollen and wet, but all that came out was moans—little gasping whines that he’d never heard himself make before.

entry.title: Kon-el’s Ultimate Guide Book to Surviving Another Universe
entry.summary:
Author: Alphaghetti_24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,426Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Imagine you’re walking down the street then suddenly BOOM! you've been blasted into a new universe. Yeah right! As if! Well… not as if for Kon. He’s really gonna kick himself later for this… Nevertheless, he’s gotta try and figure this shit out and hopefully get home before his friends follow him to this other world ready to commit heinous war crimes. He’s really… really… hopeful that doesn’t happen. -OR- Kon-el is sent to the Young Justice Cartoon world! (Rewrite of Skyrocket’s guide to surviving another universe)

entry.title: I'll Cover You
entry.summary:
Author: Lancelot15

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,213Chapters: 12/32Kudos: 90

Summary: Tim Drake is Transgender, and he was pretty sure he was completely and utterly alone in that.That is until his friend Kon-El comes out to him during a late night talk.Suddenly, the two find themselves looking out for each other and beginning to care about each other in different ways than before.(I suck at summaries)

entry.title: and we can go forever, until you wanna sit it out
entry.summary:
Author: dickweed7

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,892Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: He held two things in his hands. Tim's eyes dropped to them before they'd fully processed anything else in the room. The first was a matte-black ball gag with a bright blue strap—Kon’s favorite color, because Kon was completely a sap, and they had reached an unspoken agreement never to say so directly. The silicone ball was the right size, smooth and firm, the kind that spread the jaw to exactly the right amount. They'd calibrated this through trial and error, which was a process Tim kept extremely private and which Kon had approached with the same meticulous precision he brought to most things that mattered to him. The strap was already adjusted to the correct notch. It would warm quickly against skin. The second was a small red clicker --- aka timkon smut

entry.title: your best-loved dog
entry.summary:
Author: retinanebula

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,007Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 100

Summary: Tim looked down at Jason—the Red Hood, the deadliest thing a Bat was allowed to ally himself with—wearing nothing but a faceful of makeup, tight black boxer-briefs, a collar, and a leash, and decided that perhaps he’d been hit too hard on the head during his last dust-up with Harley Quinn.

entry.title: Bloody Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 76

Summary: The Red Hood surprises him by slowly pulling off the helmet. He wears a black domino underneath, curls of black hair falling into his face. Black hair… and a little white streak right in the front. Gnarly scars mar most of the right side of his face. Tim's mind churns. He looks familiar, but… but that's impossible, right. "I slept on the streets," he continues, setting his helmet down on the shelf to his left, one hand laying over it almost protectively. "I lived in the alleyways of Gotham. Trying to survive. Until Bruce took me in." No, Tim's mind rebels, even as realization sinks in. It's not possible… Before Tim can even think of something to say, Jason rips away the front of his shirt. Revealing bright red. A bold yellow R over his right breast. "I trained as hard as I could. I did whatever he asked… At least at first. But it didn't matter. They said I wasn't tough enough to be Robin. But today they say you are." All Tim can do is stare at this six foot wall of muscle standing across from him. The Robin uniform is clearly a cheap costume, the fabric thin and flimsy, the seams straining against the bulge of his muscles. Robin. Jason Todd. Alive. Here.

entry.title: Hate is a Bottomless Cup; I will Pour and Pour
entry.summary:
Author: gleamingmermaid

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,368Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 282

Summary: Tim Drake refuses to join Ra's Al Ghul. Ra's Al Ghul's obsession with Tim Drake takes a dark turn when Ra's captures him to make him sire his heir to succeed him as the Demon's Head. Tim Drake battles his worst nightmares as he plans to free himself and destroy everything Ra's has built, once and for all. Meanwhile, his family bands together and will not leave any stone unturned until Tim is back with them safe and sound.

entry.title: i can't love you(how you want me to)
entry.summary:
Author: wensbat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,838Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 29

Summary: Going undercover once again as Caroline Hill, she found she couldn’t help but feel a little more comfortable in her own skin when she was dressed and referred to in the way that matched “her disguise”. She still had a long way to go before she’d fully feel like she could be herself openly in this way, but getting a taste of “living as Caroline” made it harder and harder to deny these feelings. Heading back to her safehouse after getting information at the place she works she's stopped by a mugger little do that and Carol know Superboy shows up to put a stop to this. Refusing to leave until he knows that she'll get home safe starts a wonderful night that neither of them want to end.

entry.title: How to Make a Best Friend, Step One: A Brick
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,515Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: “Hi, there, masked figure. Can I ask why you were breaking into a warehouse that seemingly doesn’t belong to you in the middle of the night?”They twisted in his grip, wiggling and trying to escape.He began to speak again when a brick hit him in the jaw.That hurt.Or: Tim meets his new best friend, Steph hits a weird short kid in the face with a brick, Batman's a Bitch, and Stephanie Brown continues to be awesome while solving a quarter of Gotham's problems, while creating the rest.

entry.title: A Little Bit Slower Now
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,766Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 194

Summary: It's been a good few months with Jason, and he expected this crash-and-burn would come eventually. The fact it's taken this long is honestly kind of surprising. Maybe it made him let his guard down. So he takes a deep breath and— "I don't orgasm." Jason's hand, which had been slowly tracing absent-minded shapes against Tim's flank, stills. "What?" He sounds bewildered. "Yes, you do?" Tim stays silent, and Jason keeps prodding. "You cum every time we have sex." He swallows hard as, slowly, it clicks. "You've been faking it? This whole time?" There's an edge of anger in his tone now. "I'm sorry."

entry.summary:
Author: Wyvering

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,170Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 144

Summary: Tim’s a boy. He’s been a boy his whole life, even though being a boy makes his skin itch and his stomach turn and his heart ache. Tim is a boy, but maybe he doesn’t have to be. — Tim’s a girl, she just doesn’t know it yet.

entry.title: The Betrayal of a Father.
entry.summary:
Author: Dontaskjustlook

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,496Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 82

Summary: Trapped in the Batmobile’s locking system, Tim can’t move—can’t escape—left with nothing but the certainty that Bruce will come for him. And when he does, Bruce doesn’t come to help. He comes to indulge the darkest parts of himself… and finally take what he’s always wanted.DC Noncon Fest 2026. Cap 1: Dia 12 - Stuck In A Wall | "Please Stop"Cap 2: Dia 4 - Breeding.

entry.title: ulterior motives
entry.summary:
Author: tarantela

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: "Were you thinking about my fingers while rigging up that bus?" Jason bucks against the hold, sneering in Tim's face. "You wish. You wish I was thinking about you, huh?"

entry.title: The Vengeance of the Fallen One.
entry.summary:
Author: Dontaskjustlook

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,211Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 16

Summary: Bruce held the cup carefully, as if forcing himself to drink from it. Small sips. Careful ones. The cup was still nearly full while the rest of them had already finished theirs. That detail stirred Jason’s curiosity. Was Damian following in his father’s footsteps with this? Had he learned the same methods Bruce once used on others? Or was this something else? Revenge. Jason wanted answers. But more than that, he wanted to participate. He wanted his own chance to break something inside Bruce—something small and fragile that the man had never allowed anyone to touch before.DC Noncon Fest 2026. Cap 1: Dia 1 - Dollification | Drugging.Cap 2: Dia 10 - Cockwarming.
